creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

Thank you for your work (I already had a diff); from what I've heard, 
there are some nasty bugs in 2.3.2 which affect antialiasing in fonts. 
In my testing of KDE 2.2.2, this appears to be correct.  Therefore, I am 
suspending this PR until such time these problems don't exist anymore. 
Note that I'm still committing some updates to 2.3.1 which will improve 
a few things.  You'll have to wait until later to see what.  :)
